news.summary: In Memphis, Tennessee on April 14, 2025, Terminix®, a Rentokil Terminix subsidiary, unveiled the yearly compilation of the Top 50 Most Mosquito-Infested Cities in the U.S. The rankings were determined using service data from over 300 branches across the country in 2024. This list sheds light on the prevalence of mosquitoes in urban areas and serves as a reminder of the importance of pest control measures to combat these insects.
news.headline: Terminix reveals top 50 most mosquito-infested cities in the US based on 2024 service data from 300+ branches.

news.summary: Today in Boston, Manulife Investment Management, a subsidiary of Manulife Wealth & Asset Management, revealed the successful completion of around $660 million in funding for Manulife Private Equity Partners III, L.P. (the "Fund"). This recent development marks a significant milestone for the company as they continue to strengthen their private equity investment portfolio.
news.headline: Manulife IM closes $660M Manulife Private Equity Partners III with Ardian, as part of Manulife Wealth & Asset Management.

news.summary: In over 25 tours throughout Italy, including unique experiences like food and wine tastings and women-only tours, principles such as restricting group sizes, reducing carbon footprint, and backing local communities are being integrated. These initiatives align with the responsible traveler guidelines set by the City of Venice. The efforts are part of a tourism strategy based in CAMBRIDGE, Mass., as of April 14, 2025.
news.headline: EF Ultimate Break offers 25+ tours across Italy with a focus on responsible travel, including limiting group sizes and supporting local communities. Travel experiences catered for Gen Z and Millennial travelers.

news.summary: The recent accomplishment showcases the company's innovative commercial-scale battery recycling technologies, which have been developed internally and are the first of their kind. This achievement demonstrates the company's ability to recover battery critical materials while meeting strict material quality specifications and standards. The success of these technologies underscores the company's expertise in this area and signifies a significant advancement in the industry's efforts towards sustainable battery recycling.
news.headline: American Battery Technology Co. named "Recycling Technology Solution 2025" by CleanTech Breakthrough for commercial-scale battery recycling with stringent material quality standards.

news.summary: Equinor ASA (OSE: EQNR, NYSE: EQNR) has announced that its board of directors is recommending to the general meeting a reduction of the company's share capital through the cancellation of own shares and the redemption of shares owned by the Norwegian State. This proposal comes after the company purchased its own shares following the authorization for share buy-back granted at the annual general meeting in May 2024.
news.headline: Equinor ASA board proposes capital reduction by canceling own shares and redeeming shares from Norwegian State due to share buy-back authorization.

news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio, on April 10, 2025, a docuseries titled "People Worth Caring About" is scheduled to debut, showcasing the stories of Ohio residents working in long-term care. This series will focus on the empathy, strength, and commitment shown by caregivers as they provide assistance.
news.headline: New docuseries "People Worth Caring About" to spotlight Ohio's long-term care workers, showcasing their compassion and dedication.

news.summary: Caterpillar Inc., a company based in Irving, Texas, has declared a commitment of $100 million to aid in the preparation of future innovators. This investment, announced on April 14, 2025, is aimed at supporting individuals who are considered instrumental in the company's success and continuous operation for the upcoming century. They have emphasized the significance of investing in people for sustaining their achievements in the long run.
news.headline: Caterpillar invests $100 million to prepare future workforce, marking 100 years. #workforce #investment #100years

news.summary: One of the leading suppliers of capacitors, discrete semi-conductors, switches, and audible/sounding devices, Surge Components, Inc. (OTC Pink: SPRS), based in Deer Park, N.Y., revealed its financial performance for the first quarter that concluded on February 28, 2025. The company reported strong operational highlights, emphasizing its commitment to delivering top-notch service to customers while maintaining a competitive edge through efficient lead times and stable production. Surge's dedication to providing quality service contributed to its success in the market.
news.headline: Surge Components, Inc. reports Q1 2025 results, maintaining lead times & stable production, serving as a top supplier.

news.summary: ScanTech AI has managed to mitigate supply chain disruptions through diversified sourcing and strategic planning initiatives. By expanding their network of suppliers and carefully planning their operations, the company has been able to shield itself from the impact of supply shortages and disruptions. This approach has proven successful as ScanTech AI was able to maintain production levels and meet customer demands even during challenging times. The company's proactive stance in diversifying sourcing channels and implementing strategic planning has demonstrated resilience in the face of supply chain challenges.
news.headline: ScanTech AI reports minimal impact from tariffs on core business; diversified sourcing and planning key.

news.summary: APA Corporation, trading as APA on Nasdaq, revealed significant changes to its executive leadership squad in Houston on April 14, 2025.
news.headline: APA Corporation promotes Ben C. Rodgers to CFO and adds operational leaders to support key priorities.

news.summary: A major digital estate planning platform, Wealth.com, has disclosed a key partnership with eMoney Advisor, a top technology provider assisting individuals in financial discussions. This alliance aims to enhance the capabilities of financial advisors using the Wealth.com platform by enabling them to offer more precise, comprehensive, and efficient estate and financial planning services to clients. This integration is set to eradicate manual tasks and elevate the quality of services rendered.
news.headline: Wealth.com integrates with eMoney for streamlined AI-powered planning for advisors, offering efficient solutions for clients.

news.summary: A company profile for Haleon in 2025 has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's Enterprise Tech Ecosystem Series. This report offers details on Haleon's technology endeavors, digital transformation strategies, innovation programs, and technology initiatives. Haleon, a British consumer health company, boasts a diverse product portfolio across categories such as Oral Health, Pain, and Vitamins. The company's profile highlights its focus on technology and innovation.
news.headline: Profile on Haleon Tech Operations by ResearchAndMarkets: British consumer health company, digital strategies and innovations.

news.summary: Mantra CEO John Mullin denied reports of large-scale token transfers by major investors before the collapse of the OM token in an AMA event, stating no sales were made by key investors or advisors. Reports suggested Laser Digital cashed out 43.6 million OM tokens (worth $227 million) before the crash. Laser Digital denied involvement, claiming the wallets did not belong to them. Other investors like Shane Shin received tokens before the collapse but denied selling. OKX and Binance attributed the crash to "cross-exchange liquidations," with OKX calling it a "big scandal" in the industry._UNSUPPORTED_SEGMENT Magazine: Illegal arcade disguised as a fake Bitcoin mine? Soldier scams in China: Asia Express.
news.headline: Mantra CEO dismisses OM insider trading claims, denies investor involvement in $227M token dump before crash.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global unemployment rate has reached a record high of 190 million people, marking a significant increase from previous years. The report also indicates that youth unemployment accounts for 35% of the total global unemployment, affecting approximately 63 million individuals aged 15-24. The COVID-19 pandemic has played a major role in exacerbating this issue, with many industries struggling to recover, leading to layoffs and job cuts. These alarming statistics highlight the urgent need for governments and organizations to implement effective strategies to address the growing unemployment crisis on a global scale.
news.headline: Tether becomes top crypto lender post industry crash, per reports.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5% in the latest quarter. This marks a significant decrease of 1.2% from the previous quarter. The number of unemployed individuals decreased by 350,000 to a total of 1.2 million. Additionally, the labor force participation rate has increased by 0.5% to reach 63.2%. These figures indicate a positive shift in the job market and overall economic conditions.
news.headline: Russian crude oil production to remain stable till 2050 as per energy plan.
Hassett says no chance of US recession in 2021.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, in Washington, the American Pharmacists Association (APhA) shared news of Brian Lawson, PharmD, ICE-CCP, being named the new Executive Director of the Board of Pharmacy Specialties (BPS). BPS is a key division of APhA, renowned for its post-licensure initiatives. This appointment marks a significant development in the pharmacy sector.
news.headline: Brian Lawson appointed as Executive Director of the Board of Pharmacy Specialties by APhA in April 2025.

news.summary: A Chinese company, SWS Medical, known for its blood purification solutions, will be attending the 2025 Congress of the African Association of Nephrology in Tunis, Tunisia from April 15 to 18 at booth #7. SWS, with over 20 years of experience in the field, will showcase its innovations at the event.
news.headline: SWS Medical to showcase at AFRAN Congress in Tunisia, April 15-18. Leading blood purification provider in China.

news.summary: Trex Company [NYSE:TREX], the top producer of high-performance, low-maintenance composite decking and railing, and a key brand of outdoor living products, has been recognized as Green Builder Media’s "Sustainable Brand Leader" in the decking sector for the 15th consecutive year. Additionally, the Company's latest product, Trex Select® decking, was chosen by Green Builder editors as one of the 50 most “Sustainable Products of the Year,” solidifying Trex's position as an industry leader.
news.headline: Trex Company's Trex Select decking named one of top 50 sustainable products of the year for 15th consecutive year.

news.summary: In New York, Urban Standard Capital revealed an enhanced collaboration with GCM Grosvenor, a prominent alternative asset management company. This venture, valued at $135 million, will empower Urban Standard to generate more than $1 billion in loans. By solidifying its position as a top real estate finance provider, Urban Standard aims to increase its impact in the industry.
news.headline: Urban Standard Capital teams up with GCM Grosvenor in a $135M joint venture to generate $1B in loans, solidifying market position.
NVIDIA: Mass production at Texas plants to ramp up in 12-15 months.

news.summary: Attend the RSA Conference 2025 to hear Varonis deliver a mainstage keynote and visit booth #5658 in North Hall to discover how automation can enhance data security.
news.headline: Varonis to speak at RSA Conference 2025, focusing on automating data security in the AI Era. Visit booth #5658 in North Hall.
Hassett is confident: no US recession in 2019.

news.summary: A webinar featuring prominent figures in the engines, equipment, and components sector took place in Washington on April 14, 2025. The discussion centered around remanufacturing and its impact on sustainability and the circular economy. The recorded session is now accessible online for viewing. The webinar highlighted key insights and perspectives from industry leaders, shedding light on the significance of remanufacturing in promoting environmental sustainability.
news.headline: Webinar on remanufacturing engines for circular economy success available online. Industry leaders share insights.
NVIDIA building supercomputer manufacturing plants in Texas, with Foxconn in Houston and with Wistron in Dallas.

news.summary: Sonder Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: SOND) based in San Francisco, revealed plans to enhance its financial position and cut costs. The company announced the sale of about $18 million shares of its Series A preferred stock on April 11, 2025. Additionally, they disclosed amendments to the Note and Warrant Purchase Agreement aimed at reducing expenses. Sonder also provided an update on its partnership with Marriott International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MAR).
news.headline: Sonder Holdings Inc. raises $18 million through stock sale, updates integration with Marriott International, Inc.
NVIDIA Blackwell chips have started production at TSMC's chip plants in Phoenix, Arizona.

news.summary: Motivus, a prominent global technology and Data and AI consulting firm based in Dallas, has recently appointed two new executives to its leadership team. Kevin Walmsley has been named Chief Financial and Operations Officer (CFOO) while Navneet Narula has taken on the role of Chief Sales Officer (CSO). With the aim of achieving ambitious growth targets, the company aims to leverage the extensive experience of these executives to drive strategic initiatives that foster growth and deliver digital innovation to clients. This move comes as Motivus continues its journey towards meeting its growth goals.
news.headline: Motivus appoints Kevin Walmsley as CFOO and Navneet Narula as CSO to drive growth targets and digital innovation initiatives.
NVIDIA commissioned manufacturing space to build and test Blackwell chips in Arizona and AI supercomputers in Texas.

news.summary: In a recent development, Pyramid Global Hospitality has revealed changes in its executive team. The company's current Chief Financial Officer, Isaac Hicks, will now transition into the role of Chief Operating Officer. Simultaneously, Judy Brigham has been promoted to the position of CFO. This news comes from Boston and The Woodlands, Texas, with the announcement made on April 14, 2025. Additionally, it was disclosed that Eric Habermann, the current COO, is set to retire this month after serving the organization for seven years. These shifts mark a significant transformation in Pyramid's leadership structure as it navigates changes within the company.
news.headline: Pyramid Global Hospitality announces retirement of COO Eric Habermann with CFO Isaac Hicks stepping into COO role. Judy Brigham promoted to CFO.

news.summary: An order has been placed for the Mullen ONE Class 1 EV cargo van for tasks related to maintenance and material transport. The initial order includes one van, with plans for more orders to be made in the future.
news.headline: Mullen receives commercial EV order from Global Expert Shipping in LA for ONE Class 1 EV van; more orders to come.

news.summary: In Houston on April 14, 2025, it was announced that on April 21, 2025, a group of amateur athletes will strive to leave a lasting impact at the 129th Boston Marathon, backed by Bank of America and supported by CITGO Petroleum Corporation. As the designated fuel sponsor for the event, this will mark a significant moment in marathon history.
news.headline: CITGO sponsors 129th Boston Marathon on April 21, 2025. Everyday athletes strive for history with CITGO's support.

news.summary: A new community-based art installation by the Soloviev Foundation in New York commemorates 250 years of American history through personal narratives and impactful imagery. Titled Path of Liberty: That Which Unites US, the installation aims to celebrate the nation's legacy and will be displayed in the upcoming Freedom exhibition.
news.headline: New community art installation in NYC, "Path of Liberty: That Which Unites US," debuts on May 15, 2025, celebrating 250 years of American history.

news.summary: Connecticut often receives playful teasing from those outside the state, including some popular social media personalities and comedians. Despite some good-natured humor aimed its way, Connecticut is proud of the unique attention it garners. In a lighthearted homage called Road-Less-Traveled, the state pays tribute to its idiosyncrasies. The event took place in Stratford, Connecticut on April 14, 2025, and drew attention from many with an interest in the state's personality.
news.headline: Two Roads Brewery launches new campaign "Have a Beer, Connecticut" to celebrate state quirks. Located in Stratford, April 14, 2025.

news.summary: In the latest Dresner report released on April 14, 2025, Cube emerged as the top-ranking company in the inaugural year assessment. The company was recognized for its universal semantic layer platform, securing the number one spot in the 2025 Dresner Advisory Wisdom of Crowds® Semantic Layer Market Study. Cube's achievement signifies its prominent position in the industry, reflecting strong performance and market acceptance. This acknowledgment highlights Cube's success in the increasingly competitive market landscape.
news.headline: Cube is ranked #1 in Dresner Advisory Services' 2025 Semantic Market Study. Leading semantic layer platform.

news.summary: Renowned chefs Marc Murphy, Amanda Freitag, and Tess Sinatro will serve as judges for the Food Education Fund Colavita Culinary Challenge. This year marks the seventh consecutive collaboration between the Food Education Fund and Colavita for the event. The challenge is set to take place in New York on April 14, 2025. This annual event aims to showcase the culinary talents of participants and promote food education. The partnership between the Food Education Fund and Colavita has been successful, with increasing participation and engagement over the years. This year's event promises to be another exciting edition, with a significant impact on culinary education and skill development.
news.headline: 7th Annual Colavita Culinary Challenge held in NY with judges Marc Murphy, Amanda Freitag, and Tess Sinatro.

news.summary: ZoomInfo, based in Vancouver, Washington, has recently enhanced its ZoomInfo Copilot tool to provide AI-powered account insights that go well beyond the early prospecting phases. This update aims to offer users a more advanced and comprehensive understanding of their target accounts.
news.headline: ZoomInfo's updated Copilot features offer AI-driven sales capabilities throughout the sales funnel, enhancing account insights.

news.summary: Las Vegas - Rimini Street, Inc., a leading third-party support provider for Oracle, SAP, and VMware software, will release its earnings after the market closes on May 1, 2025. The company, listed on Nasdaq under RMNI, is a global provider of enterprise software support and innovation solutions. A conference call and webcast will be held on the same day at 5:00 p.m. Eastern / 2:00 p.m. Pacific time to discuss the first quarter 2025 results and the outlook for 2025. Interested parties can access a live webcast of the event.
news.headline: Rimini Street (Nasdaq: RMNI) will report Q1 2025 financial results on May 1, 2025. Conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern / 2:00 p.m. Pacific time.

news.summary: In New York, JLL Partners, LLC, a middle market private equity firm specializing in healthcare, aerospace & defense, and business services, has promoted Gerard Van Spaendonck to Head of Value Creation. Additionally, Raj Bhavsar has joined as Chief Technology Officer and Tom Burke as Operating Partner. These moves enhance JLL's value creation team, underscoring the firm's strategic focus.
news.headline: JLL Partners appoints Head of Value Creation, Chief Technology Officer & Operating Partner, strengthening team.

news.summary: In Lowell, Mass., and Weston, Fla., a recent announcement was made that UKG revealed Gillette Children’s is utilizing workforce intelligence to establish a stimulating and efficient work atmosphere.
news.headline: Gillette Children’s Hospital uses UKG's workforce intelligence for enhancing employee and patient experiences.

news.summary: Based in Mountain View, California, SentinelOne has recently been recognized as the top-performing vendor in the Endpoint Security category for the year 2025 according to Frost Radar™. This achievement solidifies SentinelOne's position in the market, highlighting their exceptional performance in this sector.
news.headline: SentinelOne named top performer in Frost Radar™ Endpoint Security, 2025.

news.summary: A private investment group led by Falx Capital LLC has acquired Pyramid Time Systems, LLC, a leading provider of time and attendance solutions and synchronized time systems. Founded in 1969, Pyramid Time Systems has established itself as a trusted supplier to over 30,000 companies in North America. With over 55 years of experience, the company has catered to various industries including healthcare, education, and more.
news.headline: Falx Capital acquires Pyramid Time Systems, a leader in time solutions, servicing 30,000 companies in North America.

news.summary: In Irvine, California, TP-Link Systems Inc. revealed their new role as an official Common Vulnerability and Exposures Program (CVE®) Numbering Authority (CNA). This recognition allows TP-Link to allocate CVE IDs to specific vulnerabilities concerning its products, showcasing their dedication to enhancing cybersecurity. The CVE Program, a global initiative, aims to identify and address security vulnerabilities. This step underscores TP-Link's proactive approach towards cybersecurity as they step into this crucial role.
news.headline: TP-Link authorized as CVE Numbering Authority, can assign CVE IDs to vulnerabilities, enhancing cybersecurity efforts.

news.summary: In New York, Visible has introduced a new offer for its customers this summer. Those signing up for the Visible+ Pro plan starting today can enjoy tickets to major music festivals and sporting events nationwide, simply by being on this plan. This exclusive offer gives access to the hottest games and biggest music festivals this season. Customers, including both new sign-ups and those upgrading to the Visible+ Pro plan, are eligible to receive these benefits. This initiative provides a unique opportunity for customers to enjoy various events by being on the Visible+ Pro plan.
news.headline: Visible offers Visible+ Pro plan customers tickets to major events. Upgrade to get access.

news.summary: In WACO, Texas, Baylor University and McLennan Community College (MCC) have unveiled two new General Assembly training programs to help individuals interested in advancing their tech career skills. This initiative aims to address the cybersecurity talent shortage in Texas and beyond. As part of their partnership, these institutions are offering alternative pathways for learners to acquire crucial skills amidst a skills crisis in the US. Rafael Caste emphasized the importance of universities and colleges in bridging this gap, highlighting the urgency of the situation.
news.headline: Baylor University and McLennan Community College partner with General Assembly to close tech skills gap, offering new training programs to learners. Universities aim to address the cybersecurity talent gap in Texas and the US.

news.summary: CTG, a part of Cegeka Group, recently introduced new cybersecurity solutions and expanded the Cegeka Modern SOC network to the U.S. Their aim is to boost cyber resilience and reduce the effects of rising cyber threats. A fresh addition to the global network, the Cegeka Modern SOC in Buffalo, New York, will play a crucial role in enhancing cybersecurity defenses. This move comes as a response to the growing number of cyber disruptions and threats in the digital sphere.
news.headline: CTG launches cyber resilience solutions & expands Cegeka Modern SOC network to US to minimize cyber threats impact.

news.summary: Boosted.ai, a company specializing in agentic AI for investment professionals, has named Christian Antaloczy as its new Chief Product Officer (CPO). Antaloczy, previously in charge of generative AI for businesses at WhatsApp (parent company Meta), will bring his extensive experience in product strategy, AI-driven innovation, and scaling solutions to his new role. He will be responsible for overseeing the development and implementation of Boosted.ai's flagship product, Boosted.ai Alfa™. This appointment highlights the company's focus on growth and innovation in the highly regulated investment industry.
news.headline: Boosted.ai appoints Christian Antaloczy as Chief Product Officer to enhance its AI for investment professionals.

news.summary: SmarterDx, a top player in clinical AI for revenue integrity and care quality, has revealed a significant strategic investment from New Mountain Capital. The leading investment firm, managing over $55 billion in assets, has decided to support SmarterDx in its upcoming growth and product innovation endeavors. The focus will be on generating value for health systems and empowering them to provide the best possible care.
news.headline: SmarterDx secures investment from New Mountain Capital to enhance growth and innovation. $55B assets under management.

news.summary: In a recent study conducted among 2,510 adults in the US and UK, it was found that 78% of consumers are eager for brands to incorporate more video content into their marketing strategies. However, the study highlighted that brands are currently failing to meet this demand. The fourth annual State of Video Technology report, published today, also indicated a significant interest in next-generation video formats such as personalized, interactive, and AI-generated videos. This trend is particularly prominent among younger demographics, individuals with higher incomes, and those who prioritize digital content. Overall, the study underscores a strong consumer preference for innovative video content, signaling a need for brands to adapt to these evolving expectations.
news.headline: Study of 2,510 adults in U.S. and U.K. shows 78% want more video from brands, 3.5x more likely to engage with Next Gen videos.

news.summary: The next meeting has been scheduled for April 23, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Central Time.
news.headline: Amplify to adjourn special meeting of stockholders to April 23, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. CT.
